prestazioni: Engine: F154 AM V8 (3.0L twin-turbo, 90° V8, 520hp stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression forged pistons, and ACL Race Series bearings for 800+ hp reliability on E85.

Turbocharger: Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA billet wheel turbo (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes (Maserati-specific flange design) to eliminate turbo lag on the F154 AM.

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup to manage crankcase pressure under extreme boost (30+ psi).
estetica: Aero: Novitec Tridente Maserati Alfieri-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed active rear wing (inspired by the MC20, adjustable via hydraulic actuators).
Wheels: HRE FF16 20x10.5" front / 21x12.5" rear forged wheels with custom offsets (ET35 front, ET25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear).

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats with custom Maserati Alfieri embroidery, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara), and a digital dash upgrade using a RaceLogic VBOX Sport display integrated into the stock cluster.
